'''rokadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shag|shag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shag|shag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rokadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokadithi|rokadithi]] || [[word:rokadiji|rokadiji]] || [[word:rokadishi|rokadishi]] || [[word:rokadiki|rokadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokaduthuthu|rokaduthuthu]] || [[word:rokadujuju|rokadujuju]] || [[word:rokadushushu|rokadushushu]] || [[word:rokadukuku|rokadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokaduthu|rokaduthu]] || [[word:rokaduju|rokaduju]] || [[word:rokadushu|rokadushu]] || [[word:rokaduku|rokaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokadufthuf|rokadufthuf]] || [[word:rokadufjuf|rokadufjuf]] || [[word:rokadufshuf|rokadufshuf]] || [[word:rokadufkuf|rokadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokadethe|rokadethe]] || [[word:rokadeje|rokadeje]] || [[word:rokadeshe|rokadeshe]] || [[word:rokadeke|rokadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokadothotho|rokadothotho]] || [[word:rokadojojo|rokadojojo]] || [[word:rokadoshosho|rokadoshosho]] || [[word:rokadokoko|rokadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokadotho|rokadotho]] || [[word:rokadojo|rokadojo]] || [[word:rokadosho|rokadosho]] || [[word:rokadoko|rokadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokadofthof|rokadofthof]] || [[word:rokadofjof|rokadofjof]] || [[word:rokadofshof|rokadofshof]] || [[word:rokadofkof|rokadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfthĂŻf|rokadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfjĂŻf|rokadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfshĂŻf|rokadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfkĂŻf|rokadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|rokadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|rokadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|rokadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|rokadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfthĂŻf|rokadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfjĂŻf|rokadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfshĂŻf|rokadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfkĂŻf|rokadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfthĂŻf|rokadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfjĂŻf|rokadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfshĂŻf|rokadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokadĂŻfkĂŻf|rokadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokadĂŠthĂŠ|rokadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rokadĂŠjĂŠ|rokadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rokadĂŠshĂŠ|rokadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rokadĂŠkĂŠ|rokadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokadathatha|rokadathatha]] || [[word:rokadajaja|rokadajaja]] || [[word:rokadashasha|rokadashasha]] || [[word:rokadakaka|rokadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokadatha|rokadatha]] || [[word:rokadaja|rokadaja]] || [[word:rokadasha|rokadasha]] || [[word:rokadaka|rokadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokadafthaf|rokadafthaf]] || [[word:rokadafjaf|rokadafjaf]] || [[word:rokadafshaf|rokadafshaf]] || [[word:rokadafkaf|rokadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rokadasha|rokadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokadshĂ«sha|rokadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokadrosha|rokadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokadmusha|rokadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokadyasha|rokadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokadnkshĂ«sha|gorokadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokadnkrosha|gorokadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokadnkmusha|gorokadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokadnkyasha|gorokadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rokakadasha|rokakadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokakadshĂ«sha|rokakadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokakadrosha|rokakadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokakadmusha|rokakadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokakadyasha|rokakadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokakadnkshĂ«sha|gorokakadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokakadnkrosha|gorokakadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokakadnkmusha|gorokakadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokakadnkyasha|gorokakadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rekĂŠdasha|rekĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rekĂŠdshĂ«sha|rekĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rekĂŠdrosha|rekĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rekĂŠdmusha|rekĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rekĂŠdyasha|rekĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorekĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gorekĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorekĂŠdnkrosha|gorekĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorekĂŠdnkmusha|gorekĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorekĂŠdnkyasha|gorekĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rokfadasha|rokfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokfadshĂ«sha|rokfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokfadrosha|rokfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokfadmusha|rokfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokfadyasha|rokfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokfadnkshĂ«sha|gorokfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokfadnkrosha|gorokfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokfadnkmusha|gorokfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokfadnkyasha|gorokfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
